# Mapbox のはじめ方 | Help | Mapbox

[メインコンテンツまでスキップ](https://docs.mapbox.com/help/ja/getting-started/#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

ようこそ、Mapbox へ！このガイドでは、Mapbox の主要な製品とツールの概要と、強力な位置情報アプリケーションを構築するための基本ステップやリソースを紹介します。

Mapbox とは？[​](https://docs.mapbox.com/help/ja/getting-started/#what-is-mapbox "Mapbox とは？ への直接リンク")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Mapbox は、開発者がカスタム地図、ナビゲーション、検索機能をアプリに組み込むための構成要素を提供する、現代的な**位置情報プラットフォーム**です。Mapbox Studio のような強力なツールや豊富な API、ライブラリ、SDK を使って、Web、モバイル、ゲーム、組み込みシステム向けの高性能な地理空間体験を構築できます。

プロジェクトの一環として地図を作成する場合でも、複雑な地理空間アプリを構築する場合でも、Mapbox はそのビジョンを実現するためのサービスとソフトウェアを提供します。プラットフォームは柔軟性が高く、スケーラブルで使いやすく、あらゆるスキルレベルの開発者に対応しています。

[無料アカウントを作成する](https://console.mapbox.com/)

プラットフォーム概要[​](https://docs.mapbox.com/help/ja/getting-started/#platform-overview "プラットフォーム概要 への直接リンク")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Mapbox は、API、SDK、ツールで構成されるモジュール型プラットフォームを提供し、開発者がそれらを組み合わせて完全にカスタマイズされたロケーション体験を構築できます。製品群は主に次の4カテゴリに分類されます：

[PLAYGROUND\
\
インタラクティブ開発者チートシート\
\
製品カタログをビジュアルで確認できるチートシートを試してみてください](https://labs.mapbox.com/developer-cheatsheet)

### Maps（地図）[​](https://docs.mapbox.com/help/ja/getting-started/#maps%E5%9C%B0%E5%9B%B3 "Maps（地図） への直接リンク")

地図は Mapbox プラットフォームの基盤です。Mapbox はインタラクティブマップ、静的マップ、カスタムスタイルなど多彩なマッピング製品を提供しており、すべて堅牢なグローバル空間データに基づいています。

![Mapbox Maps](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/609ed46055e27a02ffc0749b/668ed88b0d1cb50a971bf2e9_64d2310b77a293e18725a871_London_Day%2520-Mapbox%2520Standard-2023-MKTG-approved%2520(rounded).png)

[Mapbox GL JS](https://docs.mapbox.com/mapbox-gl-js/ja/)
、[iOS](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/ja/maps/)
、[Android](https://docs.mapbox.com/android/ja/maps/)
 向け Maps SDK は、Web やモバイルアプリで高性能なインタラクティブマップを描画するための強力なライブラリです。3D 地形、ベクトルタイル、動的スタイリングといった高度な機能に対応し、インタラクションとユーザー体験の完全な制御が可能です。

Maps API はマップデータへのプログラムによるアクセスを提供し、データ管理やカスタムマップ体験の構築に活用できます。

[GUIDE\
\
Map 製品の概要\
\
Mapbox Maps 製品の概要を読む](https://docs.mapbox.com/help/ja/getting-started/maps/)

### Search（検索）[​](https://docs.mapbox.com/help/ja/getting-started/#search%E6%A4%9C%E7%B4%A2 "Search（検索） への直接リンク")

Mapbox の Search 製品は、ジオコーディング、リバースジオコーディング、地点検索などの機能を提供します。

![Mapbox Search Box](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6050a76fa6a633d5d54ae714/642be30ada547980c2c8b481_search-box__colout_01.jpg)

フロントエンドの検索ライブラリや SDK は、UI コンポーネントを簡単に導入でき、アプリに素早く検索機能を追加できます。[Mapbox Search API](https://docs.mapbox.com/api/ja/search/)
 は、カスタム検索体験を実現するためのデータアクセスを提供します。

[GUIDE\
\
Search 製品の概要\
\
Mapbox Search 製品の概要を読む](https://docs.mapbox.com/help/ja/getting-started/search/)

### Navigation（ナビゲーション）[​](https://docs.mapbox.com/help/ja/getting-started/#navigation%E3%83%8A%E3%83%93%E3%82%B2%E3%83%BC%E3%82%B7%E3%83%A7%E3%83%B3 "Navigation（ナビゲーション） への直接リンク")

[iOS](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/ja/navigation/guides/)
、[Android](https://docs.mapbox.com/android/ja/navigation/guides/)
 向け Navigation SDK は、インタラクティブなターンバイターンナビゲーション、ルート最適化、リアルタイム交通情報を提供します。UI コンポーネントをすぐに統合でき、スタイルやナビ体験の完全なカスタマイズも可能です。

![Mapbox Navigation](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6050a76fa6a633d5d54ae714/6596080d45084a14ff2582b2_img-hero.webp)

[Navigation API](https://docs.mapbox.com/api/ja/navigation/)
 はルーティング、交通、ナビゲーションデータへのアクセスを提供します。具体的には [Directions API](https://docs.mapbox.com/api/ja/navigation/directions/)
（ターンバイターン）、[Isochrone API](https://docs.mapbox.com/api/ja/navigation/isochrone/)
（到達時間分析）、[Map Matching API](https://docs.mapbox.com/api/ja/navigation/map-matching/)
（GPS トレースの道路スナップ）などがあります。

[GUIDE\
\
Navigation 製品の概要\
\
Mapbox Navigation 製品の概要を読む](https://docs.mapbox.com/help/ja/getting-started/navigation/)

### データ製品[​](https://docs.mapbox.com/help/ja/getting-started/#%E3%83%87%E3%83%BC%E3%82%BF%E8%A3%BD%E5%93%81 "データ製品 への直接リンク")

Mapbox のデータ製品は、地図やアプリケーションを補完する追加のデータレイヤーやインサイトを提供します。交通、移動、行政境界などのプレミアムデータセットが含まれます。

すべての Mapbox データ製品については [ドキュメントのランディングページ](https://docs.mapbox.com/ja/#data)
 をご覧ください。

Map 開発者ジャーニー[​](https://docs.mapbox.com/help/ja/getting-started/#build-with-mapbox "Map 開発者ジャーニー への直接リンク")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

\_\_インタラクティブな地図\_\_に\_\_カスタムデータ\_\_と\_\_ユーザー操作\_\_を組み込むことは、Mapbox 初心者が最もよく行う開発の流れです。以下のジャーニーでは、このステップをガイドし、必要なドキュメントやリソースも紹介します。

[Get started](https://docs.mapbox.com/help/ja/getting-started/map-developer-journey/)

![](https://docs.mapbox.com/help/img/dev-journey-map/arrow.svg)

[Add map](https://docs.mapbox.com/help/ja/getting-started/map-developer-journey/start-mapping/)

![](https://docs.mapbox.com/help/img/dev-journey-map/arrow.svg)

[Add data](https://docs.mapbox.com/help/ja/getting-started/map-developer-journey/data-guide/)

![](https://docs.mapbox.com/help/img/dev-journey-map/arrow.svg)

[Configure interactions](https://docs.mapbox.com/help/ja/getting-started/map-developer-journey/configure-interactions/)

![](https://docs.mapbox.com/help/img/dev-journey-map/arrow.svg)

[Deploy](https://docs.mapbox.com/help/ja/getting-started/map-developer-journey/post-launch-checklist/)

[Map 開発者ジャーニーをたどる](https://docs.mapbox.com/getting-started/map-developer-journey/)

料金を理解する[​](https://docs.mapbox.com/help/ja/getting-started/#%E6%96%99%E9%87%91%E3%82%92%E7%90%86%E8%A7%A3%E3%81%99%E3%82%8B "料金を理解する への直接リンク")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Mapbox では、開発者フレンドリーな価格モデルを採用しており、開発初期は無料枠を提供し、本番運用に移行すると従量課金に切り替わります。成長に応じて費用が発生する仕組みです。[製品ごとの料金](https://www.mapbox.com/pricing/)
をご確認ください。

年間契約割引や他のオプションについては、[営業チーム](https://www.mapbox.com/contact/sales/)
にお問い合わせください。

アカウント管理[​](https://docs.mapbox.com/help/ja/getting-started/#manage-your-account "アカウント管理 への直接リンク")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

[Mapbox Console](https://console.mapbox.com/)
 は、アカウント管理のハブです。アクセストークンの作成と管理、使用状況の確認、請求設定の変更などが行えます。また、マップスタイルやデータセットの管理、Mapbox Studio でのマップデザインもここからアクセスできます。

インスピレーションを得る[​](https://docs.mapbox.com/help/ja/getting-started/#get-inspired "インスピレーションを得る への直接リンク")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

次のリソースでプロジェクトのヒントを得ましょう：

*   Mapbox の [ブログ](https://www.mapbox.com/blog)
     で新機能や製品情報をチェック
*   [カスタマーショーケース](https://mapbox.com/showcase)
     で多様な業界での導入事例を見る
*   [ウェビナー](https://www.mapbox.com/webinars)
     に参加するか、[YouTube チャンネル](https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCIHl9sd2brgvjBlSETKYDcg)
    で過去のセッションを視聴
*   [X（旧Twitter）](https://x.com/mapbox)
    、[Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/mapbox/)
    、[BlueSky](https://bsky.app/profile/mapbox.com)
    、[LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/company/mapbox)
     をフォロー
*   [Mapbox GL JS のインタラクティブなサンプル](https://docs.mapbox.com/mapbox-gl-js/ja/example/)
    とコードスニペットをチェック（多くはモバイルにも応用可能）
*   [iOS](https://docs.mapbox.com/help/ja/tutorials/maps-sdk-ios-examples-app/)
    、[Android](https://docs.mapbox.com/help/ja/tutorials/maps-sdk-android-examples-app/)
     向けのサンプルアプリとソースコードを参照

ヘルプを得る[​](https://docs.mapbox.com/help/ja/getting-started/#get-help "ヘルプを得る への直接リンク")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

If you have questions about your account, billing or email verification issues, you can create a [support ticket](https://support.mapbox.com/hc/en-us)
.

If you are experiencing technical issues while implementing Mapbox, we offer [paid plans](https://www.mapbox.com/support#support-plans)
 which allow you to create tickets and contact our technical support team directly.

You can also find helpful resources, tutorials, and FAQs in our [help docs](https://docs.mapbox.com/help/ja/)
. You can post questions on [Stack Overflow](https://stackoverflow.com/questions/ask)
 or in our [Mapbox Developer Discord](https://discord.com/invite/uMpcC5RmJh)
 to seek help from the broader community of Mapbox developers.

このpageは役に立ちましたか？はいいいえ

# MapView  Reference

[MapView\
=======](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.8.2/MapView.html#/MapView)

*   `[MapView](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.8.2/MapView.html#/c:@M@MapboxMaps@objc(cs)MapView) `
    
    Undocumented
    
    [See more](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.8.2/Classes/MapView.html)
    
    #### Declaration
    
*   `[MapInitOptions](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.8.2/MapView.html#/c:@M@MapboxMaps@objc(cs)MapInitOptions) `
    
    Options used when initializing `[MapView](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.8.2/Classes/MapView.html) `.
    
    Contains the `[ResourceOptions](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.8.2/Structs/ResourceOptions.html) `, `MapOptions` (including `GlyphsRasterizationOptions`) that are required to initialize a `[MapView](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.8.2/Classes/MapView.html) `.
    
    [See more](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.8.2/Classes/MapInitOptions.html)
    
    #### Declaration
    
*   `[MapInitOptionsProvider](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.8.2/MapView.html#/c:@M@MapboxMaps@objc(pl)MapInitOptionsProvider) `
    
    Undocumented
    
    [See more](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.8.2/Protocols/MapInitOptionsProvider.html)
    
    #### Declaration
    

[### ResourceOptions](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.8.2/MapView.html#/ResourceOptions)

*   `[ResourceOptions](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.8.2/MapView.html#/s:10MapboxMaps15ResourceOptionsV) `
    
    Options to configure access to a resource
    
    [See more](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.8.2/Structs/ResourceOptions.html)
    
    #### Declaration
    
*   `[ResourceOptionsManager](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.8.2/MapView.html#/s:10MapboxMaps22ResourceOptionsManagerC) `
    
    Convenience class that manages a global `[ResourceOptions](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.8.2/Structs/ResourceOptions.html) `
    
    It’s possible to create `ResourceOptionsManager` instances as you need them, however it’s convenient to use the default object (`default`).
    
    For example, we recommend that the Mapbox access token be set in `application(_:didFinishLaunchingWithOptions:)` rather than relying on the value in your application’s Info.plist:
    
        ```
        func application(_ application: UIApplication, didFinishLaunchingWithOptions launchOptions: [UIApplication.LaunchOptionsKey: Any]?) -> Bool {
            // Override point for customization after application launch.
            ResourceOptionsManager.default.resourceOptions.accessToken = "overridden-access-token"
            return true
        }
        ```
        
    
    [See more](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.8.2/Classes/ResourceOptionsManager.html)
    
    #### Declaration
    
*   `[MapOptions](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.8.2/MapView.html#/c:objc(cs)MBMMapOptions) `
    
    [See more](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.8.2/Extensions/MapOptions.html)
    
    #### Declaration
    
*   `[GlyphsRasterizationOptions](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.8.2/MapView.html#/c:objc(cs)MBMGlyphsRasterizationOptions) `
    
    [See more](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.8.2/Extensions/GlyphsRasterizationOptions.html)
    
    #### Declaration
    
*   `[InterfaceOrientationProvider](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.8.2/MapView.html#/s:10MapboxMaps28InterfaceOrientationProviderP) `
    
    A protocol that supplies current interface orientation for the specified view.
    
    Use this protocol when the map view is used in non-application target (e.g. application extension target).
    
    [See more](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.8.2/Protocols/InterfaceOrientationProvider.html)
    
    #### Declaration
    
*   `[AttributionURLOpener](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.8.2/MapView.html#/s:10MapboxMaps20AttributionURLOpenerP) `
    
    A protocol to open attribution URLs.
    
    Use this protocol when the map view is used in non-application target(e.g. application extension target).
    
    [See more](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.8.2/Protocols/AttributionURLOpener.html)
    
    #### Declaration

# MapView  Reference

[MapView\
=======](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.9.1/MapView.html#/MapView)

*   `[MapView](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.9.1/MapView.html#/c:@M@MapboxMaps@objc(cs)MapView) `
    
    Undocumented
    
    [See more](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.9.1/Classes/MapView.html)
    
    #### Declaration
    
*   `[MapInitOptions](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.9.1/MapView.html#/c:@M@MapboxMaps@objc(cs)MapInitOptions) `
    
    Options used when initializing `[MapView](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.9.1/Classes/MapView.html) `.
    
    Contains the `[ResourceOptions](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.9.1/Structs/ResourceOptions.html) `, `MapOptions` (including `GlyphsRasterizationOptions`) that are required to initialize a `[MapView](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.9.1/Classes/MapView.html) `.
    
    [See more](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.9.1/Classes/MapInitOptions.html)
    
    #### Declaration
    
*   `[MapInitOptionsProvider](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.9.1/MapView.html#/c:@M@MapboxMaps@objc(pl)MapInitOptionsProvider) `
    
    A protocol used to provide `[MapInitOptions](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.9.1/Classes/MapInitOptions.html) ` when initializing a `[MapView](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.9.1/Classes/MapView.html) ` with a Storyboard or a nib.
    
    [See more](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.9.1/Protocols/MapInitOptionsProvider.html)
    
    #### Declaration
    

[### ResourceOptions](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.9.1/MapView.html#/ResourceOptions)

*   `[ResourceOptions](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.9.1/MapView.html#/s:10MapboxMaps15ResourceOptionsV) `
    
    Options to configure access to a resource
    
    [See more](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.9.1/Structs/ResourceOptions.html)
    
    #### Declaration
    
*   `[ResourceOptionsManager](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.9.1/MapView.html#/s:10MapboxMaps22ResourceOptionsManagerC) `
    
    Convenience class that manages a global `[ResourceOptions](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.9.1/Structs/ResourceOptions.html) `
    
    It’s possible to create `ResourceOptionsManager` instances as you need them, however it’s convenient to use the default object (`default`).
    
    For example, we recommend that the Mapbox access token be set in `application(_:didFinishLaunchingWithOptions:)` rather than relying on the value in your application’s Info.plist:
    
        ```
        func application(_ application: UIApplication, didFinishLaunchingWithOptions launchOptions: [UIApplication.LaunchOptionsKey: Any]?) -> Bool {
            // Override point for customization after application launch.
            ResourceOptionsManager.default.resourceOptions.accessToken = "overridden-access-token"
            return true
        }
        ```
        
    
    [See more](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.9.1/Classes/ResourceOptionsManager.html)
    
    #### Declaration
    
*   `[MapOptions](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.9.1/MapView.html#/c:objc(cs)MBMMapOptions) `
    
    [See more](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.9.1/Extensions/MapOptions.html)
    
    #### Declaration
    
*   `[GlyphsRasterizationOptions](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.9.1/MapView.html#/c:objc(cs)MBMGlyphsRasterizationOptions) `
    
    [See more](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.9.1/Extensions/GlyphsRasterizationOptions.html)
    
    #### Declaration
    
*   `[InterfaceOrientationProvider](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.9.1/MapView.html#/s:10MapboxMaps28InterfaceOrientationProviderP) `
    
    A protocol that supplies current interface orientation for the specified view.
    
    Use this protocol when the map view is used in non-application target (e.g. application extension target).
    
    [See more](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.9.1/Protocols/InterfaceOrientationProvider.html)
    
    #### Declaration
    
*   `[AttributionURLOpener](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.9.1/MapView.html#/s:10MapboxMaps20AttributionURLOpenerP) `
    
    A protocol to open attribution URLs.
    
    Use this protocol when the map view is used in non-application target(e.g. application extension target).
    
    [See more](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.9.1/Protocols/AttributionURLOpener.html)
    
    #### Declaration

---

*   `[ResourceOptions](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.10.0/MapView.html#/s:10MapboxMaps15ResourceOptionsV) `

    #### Declaration
    
*   `[ResourceOptionsManager](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.10.0/MapView.html#/s:10MapboxMaps22ResourceOptionsManagerC) `
    
    Convenience class that manages a global `[ResourceOptions](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.10.0/Structs/ResourceOptions.html) `
    
    It’s possible to create `ResourceOptionsManager` instances as you need them, however it’s convenient to use the default object (`default`).
    
    For example, we recommend that the Mapbox access token be set in `application(_:didFinishLaunchingWithOptions:)` rather than relying on the value in your application’s Info.plist:
    
        ```
        func application(_ application: UIApplication, didFinishLaunchingWithOptions launchOptions: [UIApplication.LaunchOptionsKey: Any]?) -> Bool {
            // Override point for customization after application launch.
            ResourceOptionsManager.default.resourceOptions.accessToken = "overridden-access-token"
            return true
        }
        ```
        
    
    [See more](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.10.0/Classes/ResourceOptionsManager.html)

            // Override point for customization after application launch.
            ResourceOptionsManager.default.resourceOptions.accessToken = "overridden-access-token"
            return true
        }

    Options used when initializing `[MapView](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.18.2/Classes/MapView.html) `.
    
    Contains the `[ResourceOptions](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.18.2/Structs/ResourceOptions.html) `, `MapOptions` (including `GlyphsRasterizationOptions`) that are required to initialize a `[MapView](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.18.2/Classes/MapView.html) `.
    
    [See more](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.18.2/Classes/MapInitOptions.html)

    A protocol used to provide `[MapInitOptions](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.18.2/Classes/MapInitOptions.html) ` when initializing a `[MapView](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.18.2/Classes/MapView.html) ` with a Storyboard or a nib.
    
    [See more](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.18.2/Protocols/MapInitOptionsProvider.html)
    
    #### Declaration
    

[### ResourceOptions](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.18.2/MapView.html#/ResourceOptions)

*   `[ResourceOptions](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.18.2/MapView.html#/s:10MapboxMaps15ResourceOptionsV) `
    
    Options to configure access to a resource
    
    [See more](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.18.2/Structs/ResourceOptions.html)
    
    #### Declaration
    
*   `[ResourceOptionsManager](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.18.2/MapView.html#/s:10MapboxMaps22ResourceOptionsManagerC) `
    
    Convenience class that manages a global `[ResourceOptions](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.18.2/Structs/ResourceOptions.html) `
    
    It’s possible to create `ResourceOptionsManager` instances as you need them, however it’s convenient to use the default object (`default`).
    
    For example, we recommend that the Mapbox access token be set in `application(_:didFinishLaunchingWithOptions:)` rather than relying on the value in your application’s Info.plist:
    
        ```
        func application(_ application: UIApplication, didFinishLaunchingWithOptions launchOptions: [UIApplication.LaunchOptionsKey: Any]?) -> Bool {
            // Override point for customization after application launch.
            ResourceOptionsManager.default.resourceOptions.accessToken = "overridden-access-token"
            return true
        }
        ```
        
    
    [See more](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.18.2/Classes/ResourceOptionsManager.html)
    
    #### Declaration
    
*   `[MapOptions](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.18.2/MapView.html#/c:objc(cs)MBMMapOptions) `
    
    [See more](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.18.2/Extensions/MapOptions.html)
    
    #### Declaration
    
*   `[GlyphsRasterizationOptions](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.18.2/MapView.html#/c:objc(cs)MBMGlyphsRasterizationOptions) `
    
    [See more](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.18.2/Extensions/GlyphsRasterizationOptions.html)
    
    #### Declaration
    
*   `[InterfaceOrientationProvider](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.18.2/MapView.html#/s:10MapboxMaps28InterfaceOrientationProviderP) `
    
    A protocol that supplies current interface orientation for the specified view.
    
    Use this protocol when the map view is used in non-application target (e.g. application extension target).
    
    [See more](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.18.2/Protocols/InterfaceOrientationProvider.html)
    
    #### Declaration
    
*   `[AttributionURLOpener](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.18.2/MapView.html#/s:10MapboxMaps20AttributionURLOpenerP) `
    
    A protocol to open attribution URLs.
    
    Use this protocol when the map view is used in non-application target(e.g. application extension target).
    
    [See more](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.18.2/Protocols/AttributionURLOpener.html)
    
    #### Declaration

*   `[MapView](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.5.1/MapView.html#/c:@M@MapboxMaps@objc(cs)MapView) `
    
    Undocumented
    
    [See more](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.5.1/Classes/MapView.html)
    
    #### Declaration
    
*   `[MapInitOptions](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.5.1/MapView.html#/c:@M@MapboxMaps@objc(cs)MapInitOptions) `
    
    Options used when initializing `[MapView](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.5.1/Classes/MapView.html) `.
    
    Contains the `[ResourceOptions](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.5.1/Structs/ResourceOptions.html) `, `MapOptions` (including `GlyphsRasterizationOptions`) that are required to initialize a `[MapView](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.5.1/Classes/MapView.html) `.
    
    [See more](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.5.1/Classes/MapInitOptions.html)
    
    #### Declaration
    
*   `[MapInitOptionsProvider](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.5.1/MapView.html#/c:@M@MapboxMaps@objc(pl)MapInitOptionsProvider) `
    
    Undocumented
    
    [See more](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.5.1/Protocols/MapInitOptionsProvider.html)
    
    #### Declaration
    

[### ResourceOptions](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.5.1/MapView.html#/ResourceOptions)

*   `[ResourceOptions](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.5.1/MapView.html#/s:10MapboxMaps15ResourceOptionsV) `
    
    Options to configure access to a resource
    
    [See more](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.5.1/Structs/ResourceOptions.html)
    
    #### Declaration
    
*   `[ResourceOptionsManager](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.5.1/MapView.html#/s:10MapboxMaps22ResourceOptionsManagerC) `
    
    Convenience class that manages a global `[ResourceOptions](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.5.1/Structs/ResourceOptions.html) `
    
    It’s possible to create `ResourceOptionsManager` instances as you need them, however it’s convenient to use the default object (`default`).
    
    For example, we recommend that the Mapbox access token be set in `application(_:didFinishLaunchingWithOptions:)` rather than relying on the value in your application’s Info.plist:
    
        ```
        func application(_ application: UIApplication, didFinishLaunchingWithOptions launchOptions: [UIApplication.LaunchOptionsKey: Any]?) -> Bool {
            // Override point for customization after application launch.
            ResourceOptionsManager.default.resourceOptions.accessToken = "overridden-access-token"
            return true
        }
        ```
        
    
    [See more](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.5.1/Classes/ResourceOptionsManager.html)
    
    #### Declaration
    
*   `[MapOptions](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.5.1/MapView.html#/c:objc(cs)MBMMapOptions) `
    
    [See more](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.5.1/Extensions/MapOptions.html)
    
    #### Declaration
    
*   `[GlyphsRasterizationOptions](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.5.1/MapView.html#/c:objc(cs)MBMGlyphsRasterizationOptions) `
    
    [See more](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.5.1/Extensions/GlyphsRasterizationOptions.html)
    
    #### Declaration
    
*   `[InterfaceOrientationProvider](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.5.1/MapView.html#/s:10MapboxMaps28InterfaceOrientationProviderP) `
    
    A protocol that supplies current interface orientation for the specified view.
    
    Use this protocol when the map view is used in non-application target (e.g. application extension target).
    
    [See more](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.5.1/Protocols/InterfaceOrientationProvider.html)
    
    #### Declaration
    
*   `[AttributionURLOpener](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.5.1/MapView.html#/s:10MapboxMaps20AttributionURLOpenerP) `
    
    A protocol to open attribution URLs.
    
    Use this protocol when the map view is used in non-application target(e.g. application extension target).
    
    [See more](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.5.1/Protocols/AttributionURLOpener.html)
    
    #### Declaration

[### ResourceOptions](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.5.0/MapView.html#/ResourceOptions)

*   `[ResourceOptions](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.5.0/MapView.html#/s:10MapboxMaps15ResourceOptionsV) `
    
    Options to configure access to a resource
    
    [See more](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.5.0/Structs/ResourceOptions.html)
    
    #### Declaration
    
*   `[ResourceOptionsManager](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.5.0/MapView.html#/s:10MapboxMaps22ResourceOptionsManagerC) `
    
    Convenience class that manages a global `[ResourceOptions](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.5.0/Structs/ResourceOptions.html) `
    
    It’s possible to create `ResourceOptionsManager` instances as you need them, however it’s convenient to use the default object (`default`).
    
    For example, we recommend that the Mapbox access token be set in `application(_:didFinishLaunchingWithOptions:)` rather than relying on the value in your application’s Info.plist:
    
        ```
        func application(_ application: UIApplication, didFinishLaunchingWithOptions launchOptions: [UIApplication.LaunchOptionsKey: Any]?) -> Bool {
            // Override point for customization after application launch.
            ResourceOptionsManager.default.resourceOptions.accessToken = "overridden-access-token"
            return true
        }
        ```
        
    
    [See more](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.5.0/Classes/ResourceOptionsManager.html)
    
    #### Declaration

    #### Declaration

    A protocol that supplies current interface orientation for the specified view.
    
    Use this protocol when the map view is used in non-application target (e.g. application extension target).
    
    [See more](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.5.0/Protocols/InterfaceOrientationProvider.html)
    
    #### Declaration

    Convenience class that manages a global `[ResourceOptions](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.18.1/Structs/ResourceOptions.html) `
    
    It’s possible to create `ResourceOptionsManager` instances as you need them, however it’s convenient to use the default object (`default`).
    
    For example, we recommend that the Mapbox access token be set in `application(_:didFinishLaunchingWithOptions:)` rather than relying on the value in your application’s Info.plist:
    
        ```
        func application(_ application: UIApplication, didFinishLaunchingWithOptions launchOptions: [UIApplication.LaunchOptionsKey: Any]?) -> Bool {
            // Override point for customization after application launch.
            ResourceOptionsManager.default.resourceOptions.accessToken = "overridden-access-token"
            return true
        }
        ```
        
    
    [See more](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.18.1/Classes/ResourceOptionsManager.html)
    
    #### Declaration
    
*   `[MapOptions](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.18.1/MapView.html#/c:objc(cs)MBMMapOptions) `
    
    [See more](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.18.1/Extensions/MapOptions.html)
    
    #### Declaration
    
*   `[GlyphsRasterizationOptions](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.18.1/MapView.html#/c:objc(cs)MBMGlyphsRasterizationOptions) `
    
    [See more](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.18.1/Extensions/GlyphsRasterizationOptions.html)
    
    #### Declaration
    
*   `[InterfaceOrientationProvider](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.18.1/MapView.html#/s:10MapboxMaps28InterfaceOrientationProviderP) `
    
    A protocol that supplies current interface orientation for the specified view.
    
    Use this protocol when the map view is used in non-application target (e.g. application extension target).
    
    [See more](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.18.1/Protocols/InterfaceOrientationProvider.html)
    
    #### Declaration
    
*   `[AttributionURLOpener](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.18.1/MapView.html#/s:10MapboxMaps20AttributionURLOpenerP) `
    
    A protocol to open attribution URLs.
    
    Use this protocol when the map view is used in non-application target(e.g. application extension target).
    
    [See more](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.18.1/Protocols/AttributionURLOpener.html)

# Uploads API | API Docs | Mapbox

[メインコンテンツまでスキップ](https://docs.mapbox.com/api/ja/maps/uploads/#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

Use the Mapbox Tiling Service

We recommend you use the [Mapbox Tiling Service (MTS)](https://docs.mapbox.com/api/ja/maps/mapbox-tiling-service/)
 to create tilesets instead of the Uploads API. MTS gives you more control over the tiling process, including [zoom levels](https://docs.mapbox.com/mapbox-tiling-service/ja/reference/#zoom-levels)
 and configuration rules called [recipes](https://docs.mapbox.com/mapbox-tiling-service/ja/guides/tileset-recipes/)
.

The **Mapbox Uploads API** transforms geographic data into tilesets that can be used with maps and geographic applications. Given a wide variety of geospatial formats, it normalizes [projections](https://docs.mapbox.com/help/ja/glossary/projection/)
 and generates tiles at multiple zoom levels to make data viewable on the web.

The upload workflow follows these steps:

1.  Request temporary S3 credentials that allow you to stage the file. _Jump to the [Retrieve S3 credentials section](https://docs.mapbox.com/api/ja/maps/uploads/#retrieve-s3-credentials)
    ._
2.  Use an S3 client to upload the file to Mapbox's S3 staging bucket using these credentials. _Learn more about this process in the [Upload to Mapbox using cURL tutorial](https://docs.mapbox.com/help/ja/tutorials/upload-curl/)
    ._
3.  Create an upload using the staged file's URL. _Jump to the [Create an upload section](https://docs.mapbox.com/api/ja/maps/uploads/#create-an-upload)
    ._
4.  Retrieve the upload's status as it is being processed into a tileset. _Jump to the [Retrieve upload status section](https://docs.mapbox.com/api/ja/maps/uploads/#retrieve-upload-status)
    ._

**Note:** This documentation discusses how to interact with the Mapbox Uploads API programmatically. For a step-by-step guide on how to use the Uploads API to stage a file to Amazon S3 and create an upload, use the [Upload to Mapbox using cURL tutorial](https://docs.mapbox.com/help/ja/tutorials/upload-curl/)
.

Retrieve S3 credentials[​](https://docs.mapbox.com/api/ja/maps/uploads/#retrieve-s3-credentials "Retrieve S3 credentials への直接リンク")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

post

https://api.mapbox.com/uploads/v1/{username}/credentials

clipboard

uploads:write

[token scope](https://docs.mapbox.com/api/overview/#access-tokens-and-token-scopes)

Mapbox provides an Amazon S3 bucket to stage your file while your upload is processed. This endpoint allows you to retrieve temporary S3 credentials to use during the staging process.

**Note:** This step is necessary before you can stage a file in the Amazon S3 bucket provided by Mapbox. All uploads must be staged in this Amazon S3 bucket before being uploaded to your Mapbox account. To learn more about how to stage an upload to Amazon S3, read the [Upload to Mapbox using cURL tutorial](https://docs.mapbox.com/help/ja/tutorials/upload-curl/#stage-your-file-on-amazon-s3)
.

| Required parameter | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `username` | `string` | The username of the account to which you are uploading a tileset. |

### Example request: Retrieve S3 credentials[​](https://docs.mapbox.com/api/ja/maps/uploads/#example-request-retrieve-s3-credentials "Example request: Retrieve S3 credentials への直接リンク")

    $curl -X POST "https://api.mapbox.com/uploads/v1/YOUR_MAPBOX_USERNAME/credentials?access_token=YOUR_SECRET_MAPBOX_ACCESS_TOKEN"

### Example AWS CLI usage[​](https://docs.mapbox.com/api/ja/maps/uploads/#example-aws-cli-usage "Example AWS CLI usage への直接リンク")

    $export AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID={accessKeyId}$export AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY={secretAccessKey}$export AWS_SESSION_TOKEN={sessionToken}$aws s3 cp /path/to/file s3://{bucket}/{key} --region us-east-1

### Response: Retrieve S3 credentials[​](https://docs.mapbox.com/api/ja/maps/uploads/#response-retrieve-s3-credentials "Response: Retrieve S3 credentials への直接リンク")

The response body is a JSON object that contains the following properties:

| Property | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `accessKeyId` | `string` | AWS Access Key ID |
| `bucket` | `string` | S3 bucket name |
| `key` | `string` | The unique key for data to be staged |
| `secretAccessKey` | `string` | AWS Secret Access Key |
| `sessionToken` | `string` | A temporary security token |
| `url` | `string` | The destination URL of the file |

Use these credentials to store your data in the provided bucket with the provided key using the [AWS CLI](http://docs.aws.amazon.com/cli/latest/reference/s3/index.html)
 or AWS SDK of your choice. The bucket is located in AWS region `us-east-1`.

### Example response: Retrieve S3 credentials[​](https://docs.mapbox.com/api/ja/maps/uploads/#example-response-retrieve-s3-credentials "Example response: Retrieve S3 credentials への直接リンク")

    {  "accessKeyId": "{accessKeyId}",  "bucket": "somebucket",  "key": "hij456",  "secretAccessKey": "{secretAccessKey}",  "sessionToken": "{sessionToken}",  "url": "{url}"}

### Supported libraries: Retrieve S3 credentials[​](https://docs.mapbox.com/api/ja/maps/uploads/#supported-libraries-retrieve-s3-credentials "Supported libraries: Retrieve S3 credentials への直接リンク")

Mapbox wrapper libraries help you integrate Mapbox APIs into your existing application. The following SDKs support this endpoint:

*   [Mapbox Python CLI](https://github.com/mapbox/mapbox-cli-py#upload)
    
*   [Mapbox JavaScript SDK](https://github.com/mapbox/mapbox-sdk-js/blob/main/docs/services.md#createuploadcredentials)
    

See the SDK documentation for details and examples of how to use the relevant methods to query this endpoint.

Create an upload[​](https://docs.mapbox.com/api/ja/maps/uploads/#create-an-upload "Create an upload への直接リンク")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

post

https://api.mapbox.com/uploads/v1/{username}

clipboard

uploads:write

[token scope](https://docs.mapbox.com/api/overview/#access-tokens-and-token-scopes)

Uploads can be created from a file staged on Mapbox's S3 bucket, or from an existing Mapbox dataset.

After you have used the temporary S3 credentials to transfer your file to Mapbox's staging bucket, you can trigger the generation of a tileset using the file's URL and a destination tileset ID.

Uploaded files _must_ be in the bucket provided by Mapbox. Requests for resources from other S3 buckets or URLs will fail.

**Note:** You can only replace existing tilesets created with the Uploads API with this endpoint. You cannot replace a tileset created with [Mapbox Tiling Service (MTS)](https://docs.mapbox.com/api/ja/maps/mapbox-tiling-service/)
 with a tileset created with the Uploads API.

| Required parameter | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `username` | `string` | The username of the account to which you are uploading. |

The request body must be a JSON object that contains the following properties:

| Request body properties | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `tileset` | `string` | The tileset ID to create or replace, in the format `username.nameoftileset`. Limited to 32 characters. This character limit does not include the username. The only allowed special characters are `-` and `_`. If you reuse a `tileset` value, this action will replace existing data. Use a random value so that a new tileset is created, or check your existing tilesets first. |
| `url` | `string` | Either the HTTPS URL of the S3 object provided in the credential request, or the [dataset ID](https://docs.mapbox.com/help/ja/glossary/dataset-id/)<br> of an existing Mapbox dataset. |
| `name` | `string` | _Optional._ The name of the tileset. Limited to 64 characters. |

Private vs. public tilesets

A newly-created tileset is _private_ by default. If you want to make the tileset _public_, click on the tileset from your Studio account's tilesets page and select the option [Make public](https://docs.mapbox.com/studio-manual/ja/reference/tilesets/#make-private)
.

### Example request: Create an upload from a file staged on S3[​](https://docs.mapbox.com/api/ja/maps/uploads/#example-request-create-an-upload-from-a-file-staged-on-s3 "Example request: Create an upload from a file staged on S3 への直接リンク")

    $curl -X POST -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "Cache-Control: no-cache" -d '{  "url": "https://{bucket}.s3.amazonaws.com/{key}",  "tileset": "{username}.{tileset-name}"}' 'https://api.mapbox.com/uploads/v1/YOUR_MAPBOX_USERNAME?access_token=YOUR_SECRET_MAPBOX_ACCESS_TOKEN'

### Example request: Create an upload from a Mapbox dataset[​](https://docs.mapbox.com/api/ja/maps/uploads/#example-request-create-an-upload-from-a-mapbox-dataset "Example request: Create an upload from a Mapbox dataset への直接リンク")

    $curl -X POST -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "Cache-Control: no-cache" -d '{  "tileset": "{username}.mytileset",  "url": "mapbox://datasets/{username}/{dataset}",  "name": "example-dataset"}' 'https://api.mapbox.com/uploads/v1/YOUR_MAPBOX_USERNAME?access_token=YOUR_SECRET_MAPBOX_ACCESS_TOKEN'

### Response: Create an upload[​](https://docs.mapbox.com/api/ja/maps/uploads/#response-create-an-upload "Response: Create an upload への直接リンク")

The response body is a JSON object that contains the following properties:

| Property | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `complete` | `boolean` | Whether the upload is complete (`true`) or not complete (`false`). |
| `tileset` | `string` | The ID of the tileset that will be created or replaced if upload is successful. |
| `error` | `string` or `null` | If `null`, the upload is in progress or has successfully completed. Otherwise, provides a brief explanation of the error. |
| `id` | `string` | The unique identifier for the upload. |
| `name` | `string` | The name of the upload. |
| `modified` | `string` | A timestamp indicating when the upload resource was last modified. |
| `created` | `string` | A timestamp indicating when the upload resource was created. |
| `owner` | `string` | The unique identifier for the owner's account. |
| `progress` | `integer` | The progress of the upload, expressed as a float between `0` (started) and `1` (completed). |

### Example response: Create an upload[​](https://docs.mapbox.com/api/ja/maps/uploads/#example-response-create-an-upload "Example response: Create an upload への直接リンク")

    {  "complete": false,  "tileset": "example.markers",  "error": null,  "id": "hij456",  "name": "example-markers",  "modified": "{timestamp}",  "created": "{timestamp}",  "owner": "{username}",  "progress": 0}

### Supported libraries: Create an upload[​](https://docs.mapbox.com/api/ja/maps/uploads/#supported-libraries-create-an-upload "Supported libraries: Create an upload への直接リンク")

Mapbox wrapper libraries help you integrate Mapbox APIs into your existing application. The following SDKs support this endpoint:

*   [Mapbox JavaScript SDK](https://github.com/mapbox/mapbox-sdk-js/blob/main/docs/services.md#createupload)
    

See the SDK documentation for details and examples of how to use the relevant methods to query this endpoint.

Retrieve upload status[​](https://docs.mapbox.com/api/ja/maps/uploads/#retrieve-upload-status "Retrieve upload status への直接リンク")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

get

https://api.mapbox.com/uploads/v1/{username}/{upload\_id}

clipboard

uploads:read

[token scope](https://docs.mapbox.com/api/overview/#access-tokens-and-token-scopes)

Once an upload is created, you can track its status. Uploads have a `progress` property that start at `0` and end at `1` when an upload is complete. If there's an error processing an upload, the `error` property will include an [error message](https://docs.mapbox.com/help/ja/troubleshooting/uploads/#errors)
.

| Required parameters | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `username` | `string` | The username of the account for which you are requesting an upload status. |
| `upload_id` | `string` | The ID of the upload. Provided in the response body to a successful upload request. |

### Example request: Retrieve upload status[​](https://docs.mapbox.com/api/ja/maps/uploads/#example-request-retrieve-upload-status "Example request: Retrieve upload status への直接リンク")

    $curl "https://api.mapbox.com/uploads/v1/YOUR_MAPBOX_USERNAME/{upload_id}?access_token=YOUR_SECRET_MAPBOX_ACCESS_TOKEN"

### Response: Retrieve upload status[​](https://docs.mapbox.com/api/ja/maps/uploads/#response-retrieve-upload-status "Response: Retrieve upload status への直接リンク")

The response body is a JSON object containing the following properties:

| Property | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `complete` | `boolean` | Indicates whether the upload is complete (`true`) or not complete (`false`). |
| `tileset` | `string` | The ID of the tileset that will be created or replaced if upload is successful. |
| `error` | `string` or `null` | If `null`, the upload is in progress or has successfully completed. Otherwise, provides a brief explanation of the error. |
| `id` | `string` | The unique identifier for the upload. |
| `name` | `string` | The name of the upload. |
| `modified` | `string` | The timestamp for when the upload resource was last modified. |
| `created` | `string` | The timestamp for when the upload resource was created. |
| `owner` | `string` | The unique identifier for the owner's account. |
| `progress` | `integer` | The progress of the upload, expressed as a float between `0` (started) and `1` (completed). |

### Example response: Retrieve upload status[​](https://docs.mapbox.com/api/ja/maps/uploads/#example-response-retrieve-upload-status "Example response: Retrieve upload status への直接リンク")

    {  "complete": true,  "tileset": "example.markers",  "error": null,  "id": "hij456",  "name": "example-markers",  "modified": "{timestamp}",  "created": "{timestamp}",  "owner": "{username}",  "progress": 1}

### Supported libraries: Retrieve upload status[​](https://docs.mapbox.com/api/ja/maps/uploads/#supported-libraries-retrieve-upload-status "Supported libraries: Retrieve upload status への直接リンク")

Mapbox wrapper libraries help you integrate Mapbox APIs into your existing application. The following SDKs support this endpoint:

*   [Mapbox JavaScript SDK](https://github.com/mapbox/mapbox-sdk-js/blob/main/docs/services.md#getupload)
    

See the SDK documentation for details and examples of how to use the relevant methods to query this endpoint.

Retrieve recent upload statuses[​](https://docs.mapbox.com/api/ja/maps/uploads/#retrieve-recent-upload-statuses "Retrieve recent upload statuses への直接リンク")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

get

https://api.mapbox.com/uploads/v1/{username}

clipboard

uploads:list

[token scope](https://docs.mapbox.com/api/overview/#access-tokens-and-token-scopes)

Retrieve multiple upload statuses at the same time, sorted by the most recently created.

This endpoint supports [pagination](https://docs.mapbox.com/api/ja/guides/#pagination)
 so that you can list many uploads.

| Required parameter | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `username` | `string` | The username of the account for which you are requesting upload statuses. |

The results from this endpoint can be further modified with the following optional parameters:

| Optional parameters | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `reverse` | `boolean` | Set this parameter to `true` to reverse the sorting order of the results. By default, the Uploads API returns the most recently created upload statuses first. |
| `limit` | `integer` | The maximum number of statuses to return, up to `100`. |

### Example request: Retrieve recent upload statuses[​](https://docs.mapbox.com/api/ja/maps/uploads/#example-request-retrieve-recent-upload-statuses "Example request: Retrieve recent upload statuses への直接リンク")

    $curl "https://api.mapbox.com/uploads/v1/YOUR_MAPBOX_USERNAME?access_token=YOUR_SECRET_MAPBOX_ACCESS_TOKEN"# Return at most 10 upload statuses, in chronological order$curl "https://api.mapbox.com/uploads/v1/YOUR_MAPBOX_USERNAME?reverse=true&limit=10&access_token=YOUR_SECRET_MAPBOX_ACCESS_TOKEN"

### Response: Retrieve recent upload statuses[​](https://docs.mapbox.com/api/ja/maps/uploads/#response-retrieve-recent-upload-statuses "Response: Retrieve recent upload statuses への直接リンク")

This request returns the same information as an individual upload status request does, but for all an account's recent uploads. The list is limited to one MB of JSON.

### Example response: Retrieve recent upload statuses[​](https://docs.mapbox.com/api/ja/maps/uploads/#example-response-retrieve-recent-upload-statuses "Example response: Retrieve recent upload statuses への直接リンク")

    [  {    "complete": true,    "tileset": "example.mbtiles",    "error": null,    "id": "abc123",    "name": null,    "modified": "2014-11-21T19:41:10.000Z",    "created": "2014-11-21T19:41:10.000Z",    "owner": "example",    "progress": 1  },  {    "complete": false,    "tileset": "example.foo",    "error": null,    "id": "xyz789",    "name": "foo",    "modified": "2014-11-21T19:41:10.000Z",    "created": "2014-11-21T19:41:10.000Z",    "owner": "example",    "progress": 0  }]

### Supported libraries: Retrieve recent upload statuses[​](https://docs.mapbox.com/api/ja/maps/uploads/#supported-libraries-retrieve-recent-upload-statuses "Supported libraries: Retrieve recent upload statuses への直接リンク")

Mapbox wrapper libraries help you integrate Mapbox APIs into your existing application. The following SDKs support this endpoint:

*   [Mapbox JavaScript SDK](https://github.com/mapbox/mapbox-sdk-js/blob/main/docs/services.md#listuploads)
    

See the SDK documentation for details and examples of how to use the relevant methods to query this endpoint.

Remove an upload status[​](https://docs.mapbox.com/api/ja/maps/uploads/#remove-an-upload-status "Remove an upload status への直接リンク")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

delete

https://api.mapbox.com/uploads/v1/{username}/{upload\_id}

clipboard

uploads:write

[token scope](https://docs.mapbox.com/api/overview/#access-tokens-and-token-scopes)

Remove the status of a completed upload from the upload listing.

Uploads are only statuses, so removing an upload from the listing doesn't delete the associated tileset. Tilesets can only be deleted from within Mapbox Studio. An upload status cannot be removed from the upload listing until after it has completed.

| Required parameters | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `username` | `string` | The username of the associated account. |
| `upload_id` | `string` | The ID of the upload. Provided in the response body to a successful upload request. |

### Example request: Remove an upload status[​](https://docs.mapbox.com/api/ja/maps/uploads/#example-request-remove-an-upload-status "Example request: Remove an upload status への直接リンク")

    $curl -X DELETE "https://api.mapbox.com/uploads/v1/YOUR_MAPBOX_USERNAME/{upload_id}?access_token=YOUR_SECRET_MAPBOX_ACCESS_TOKEN"

### Response: Remove an upload status[​](https://docs.mapbox.com/api/ja/maps/uploads/#response-remove-an-upload-status "Response: Remove an upload status への直接リンク")

> `HTTP 204 No content`

### Supported libraries: Remove an upload status[​](https://docs.mapbox.com/api/ja/maps/uploads/#supported-libraries-remove-an-upload-status "Supported libraries: Remove an upload status への直接リンク")

Mapbox wrapper libraries help you integrate Mapbox APIs into your existing application. The following SDKs support this endpoint:

*   [Mapbox JavaScript SDK](https://github.com/mapbox/mapbox-sdk-js/blob/main/docs/services.md#deleteupload)
    

See the SDK documentation for details and examples of how to use the relevant methods to query this endpoint.

Uploads API restrictions and limits[​](https://docs.mapbox.com/api/ja/maps/uploads/#uploads-api-restrictions-and-limits "Uploads API restrictions and limits への直接リンク")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   Tileset names are limited to 64-characters.
*   The default rate limit for the Mapbox Uploads API endpoint is 60 requests per minute. もし、レート制限をの数を高くしたい場合は、[お問い合わせください。](https://www.mapbox.com/contact/sales/)
    .
*   If you exceed the rate limit, you will receive an `HTTP 429 Too Many Requests` response. For information on rate limit headers, see the [Rate limit headers](https://docs.mapbox.com/api/ja/guides/#rate-limit-headers)
     section.
*   The Uploads API supports different file sizes for various file types:

| File type | Size limit |
| --- | --- |
| CSV | 1 GB |
| GeoJSON | 1 GB  <br>GeoJSON must use the [`OGC:CRS84` coordinate reference system](https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc7946#section-4)<br>. |
| GPX | 260 MB |
| KML | 260 MB |
| Mapbox Dataset | 1 GB |
| MBTiles | 25 GB |
| Shapefile (unzipped) | 260 MB (combined uncompressed size of `.shp` and `.dbf` files)  <br>Shapefiles must be uploaded as compressed `.zip` files. |
| TIFF and GeoTIFF | 10 GB |

Uploads API errors[​](https://docs.mapbox.com/api/ja/maps/uploads/#uploads-api-errors "Uploads API errors への直接リンク")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

To see a list of possible upload errors, visit the [Uploads errors page](https://docs.mapbox.com/help/ja/troubleshooting/uploads/#errors)
.

Uploads API pricing[​](https://docs.mapbox.com/api/ja/maps/uploads/#pricing "Uploads API pricing への直��接リンク")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   **tileset processing and tileset hosting** ごとに請求されます
*   料金ページの **[Tilesets](https://www.mapbox.com/pricing/#tilesets)
    ** セクションで、tileset processing and tileset hosting ごとの料金と割引をご確認ください。

Note

Mapbox Studio is powered by the Uploads API, but is subject to usage restrictions and alternative pricing. See the [Mapbox Studio pricing guide](https://docs.mapbox.com/studio-manual/ja/reference/tilesets/#pricing)
 for more details.

When you use the Uploads API, usage statistics can be reviewed on your [Statistics dashboard](https://console.mapbox.com/account/statistics/)
. If an account's tilesets usage exceeds the monthly [free tier](https://www.mapbox.com/pricing/#tilesets)
, you will see line items on the account's invoice for [**tileset processing**](https://docs.mapbox.com/mapbox-tiling-service/ja/guides/pricing/#tilesets-processing)
 and [**tileset hosting**](https://docs.mapbox.com/mapbox-tiling-service/ja/guides/pricing/#tilesets-hosting)
.

To see billing metrics for a specific tileset, go to your [tilesets page](https://console.mapbox.com/studio/tilesets/)
 and click on the tileset's name to visit the Tileset Explorer.

To learn more about how pricing works for this service, see the [tilesets pricing guide](https://docs.mapbox.com/mapbox-tiling-service/ja/guides/pricing/)
.

---

# MapView  Reference

[MapView\
=======](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.16.4/MapView.html#/MapView)

*   `[MapView](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.16.4/MapView.html#/c:@M@MapboxMaps@objc(cs)MapView) `
    
    Undocumented
    
    [See more](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.16.4/Classes/MapView.html)
    
    #### Declaration
    
*   `[MapInitOptions](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.16.4/MapView.html#/c:@M@MapboxMaps@objc(cs)MapInitOptions) `
    
    Options used when initializing `[MapView](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.16.4/Classes/MapView.html) `.
    
    Contains the `[ResourceOptions](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.16.4/Structs/ResourceOptions.html) `, `MapOptions` (including `GlyphsRasterizationOptions`) that are required to initialize a `[MapView](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.16.4/Classes/MapView.html) `.
    
    [See more](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.16.4/Classes/MapInitOptions.html)
    
    #### Declaration
    
*   `[MapInitOptionsProvider](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.16.4/MapView.html#/c:@M@MapboxMaps@objc(pl)MapInitOptionsProvider) `
    
    A protocol used to provide `[MapInitOptions](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.16.4/Classes/MapInitOptions.html) ` when initializing a `[MapView](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.16.4/Classes/MapView.html) ` with a Storyboard or a nib.
    
    [See more](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.16.4/Protocols/MapInitOptionsProvider.html)
    
    #### Declaration
    

[### ResourceOptions](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.16.4/MapView.html#/ResourceOptions)

*   `[ResourceOptions](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.16.4/MapView.html#/s:10MapboxMaps15ResourceOptionsV) `
    
    Options to configure access to a resource
    
    [See more](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.16.4/Structs/ResourceOptions.html)
    
    #### Declaration
    
*   `[ResourceOptionsManager](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.16.4/MapView.html#/s:10MapboxMaps22ResourceOptionsManagerC) `
    
    Convenience class that manages a global `[ResourceOptions](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.16.4/Structs/ResourceOptions.html) `
    
    It’s possible to create `ResourceOptionsManager` instances as you need them, however it’s convenient to use the default object (`default`).
    
    For example, we recommend that the Mapbox access token be set in `application(_:didFinishLaunchingWithOptions:)` rather than relying on the value in your application’s Info.plist:
    
        ```
        func application(_ application: UIApplication, didFinishLaunchingWithOptions launchOptions: [UIApplication.LaunchOptionsKey: Any]?) -> Bool {
            // Override point for customization after application launch.
            ResourceOptionsManager.default.resourceOptions.accessToken = "overridden-access-token"
            return true
        }
        ```
        
    
    [See more](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.16.4/Classes/ResourceOptionsManager.html)
    
    #### Declaration
    
*   `[MapOptions](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.16.4/MapView.html#/c:objc(cs)MBMMapOptions) `
    
    [See more](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.16.4/Extensions/MapOptions.html)
    
    #### Declaration
    
*   `[GlyphsRasterizationOptions](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.16.4/MapView.html#/c:objc(cs)MBMGlyphsRasterizationOptions) `
    
    [See more](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.16.4/Extensions/GlyphsRasterizationOptions.html)
    
    #### Declaration
    
*   `[InterfaceOrientationProvider](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.16.4/MapView.html#/s:10MapboxMaps28InterfaceOrientationProviderP) `
    
    A protocol that supplies current interface orientation for the specified view.
    
    Use this protocol when the map view is used in non-application target (e.g. application extension target).
    
    [See more](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.16.4/Protocols/InterfaceOrientationProvider.html)
    
    #### Declaration
    
*   `[AttributionURLOpener](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.16.4/MapView.html#/s:10MapboxMaps20AttributionURLOpenerP) `
    
    A protocol to open attribution URLs.
    
    Use this protocol when the map view is used in non-application target(e.g. application extension target).
    
    [See more](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.16.4/Protocols/AttributionURLOpener.html)
    
    #### Declaration

---

# MapView  Reference

[MapView\
=======](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.15.0/MapView.html#/MapView)

*   `[MapView](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.15.0/MapView.html#/c:@M@MapboxMaps@objc(cs)MapView) `
    
    Undocumented
    
    [See more](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.15.0/Classes/MapView.html)
    
    #### Declaration
    
*   `[MapInitOptions](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.15.0/MapView.html#/c:@M@MapboxMaps@objc(cs)MapInitOptions) `
    
    Options used when initializing `[MapView](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.15.0/Classes/MapView.html) `.
    
    Contains the `[ResourceOptions](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.15.0/Structs/ResourceOptions.html) `, `MapOptions` (including `GlyphsRasterizationOptions`) that are required to initialize a `[MapView](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.15.0/Classes/MapView.html) `.
    
    [See more](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.15.0/Classes/MapInitOptions.html)
    
    #### Declaration
    
*   `[MapInitOptionsProvider](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.15.0/MapView.html#/c:@M@MapboxMaps@objc(pl)MapInitOptionsProvider) `
    
    A protocol used to provide `[MapInitOptions](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.15.0/Classes/MapInitOptions.html) ` when initializing a `[MapView](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.15.0/Classes/MapView.html) ` with a Storyboard or a nib.
    
    [See more](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.15.0/Protocols/MapInitOptionsProvider.html)
    
    #### Declaration
    

[### ResourceOptions](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.15.0/MapView.html#/ResourceOptions)

*   `[ResourceOptions](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.15.0/MapView.html#/s:10MapboxMaps15ResourceOptionsV) `
    
    Options to configure access to a resource
    
    [See more](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.15.0/Structs/ResourceOptions.html)
    
    #### Declaration
    
*   `[ResourceOptionsManager](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.15.0/MapView.html#/s:10MapboxMaps22ResourceOptionsManagerC) `
    
    Convenience class that manages a global `[ResourceOptions](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.15.0/Structs/ResourceOptions.html) `
    
    It’s possible to create `ResourceOptionsManager` instances as you need them, however it’s convenient to use the default object (`default`).
    
    For example, we recommend that the Mapbox access token be set in `application(_:didFinishLaunchingWithOptions:)` rather than relying on the value in your application’s Info.plist:
    
        ```
        func application(_ application: UIApplication, didFinishLaunchingWithOptions launchOptions: [UIApplication.LaunchOptionsKey: Any]?) -> Bool {
            // Override point for customization after application launch.
            ResourceOptionsManager.default.resourceOptions.accessToken = "overridden-access-token"
            return true
        }
        ```
        
    
    [See more](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.15.0/Classes/ResourceOptionsManager.html)
    
    #### Declaration
    
*   `[MapOptions](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.15.0/MapView.html#/c:objc(cs)MBMMapOptions) `
    
    [See more](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.15.0/Extensions/MapOptions.html)
    
    #### Declaration
    
*   `[GlyphsRasterizationOptions](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.15.0/MapView.html#/c:objc(cs)MBMGlyphsRasterizationOptions) `
    
    [See more](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.15.0/Extensions/GlyphsRasterizationOptions.html)
    
    #### Declaration
    
*   `[InterfaceOrientationProvider](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.15.0/MapView.html#/s:10MapboxMaps28InterfaceOrientationProviderP) `
    
    A protocol that supplies current interface orientation for the specified view.
    
    Use this protocol when the map view is used in non-application target (e.g. application extension target).
    
    [See more](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.15.0/Protocols/InterfaceOrientationProvider.html)
    
    #### Declaration
    
*   `[AttributionURLOpener](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.15.0/MapView.html#/s:10MapboxMaps20AttributionURLOpenerP) `
    
    A protocol to open attribution URLs.
    
    Use this protocol when the map view is used in non-application target(e.g. application extension target).
    
    [See more](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.15.0/Protocols/AttributionURLOpener.html)

# MapView  Reference

[MapView\
=======](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.16.1/MapView.html#/MapView)

*   `[MapView](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.16.1/MapView.html#/c:@M@MapboxMaps@objc(cs)MapView) `
    
    Undocumented
    
    [See more](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.16.1/Classes/MapView.html)

*   `[MapInitOptions](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.16.1/MapView.html#/c:@M@MapboxMaps@objc(cs)MapInitOptions) `
    
    Options used when initializing `[MapView](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.16.1/Classes/MapView.html) `.
    
    Contains the `[ResourceOptions](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.16.1/Structs/ResourceOptions.html) `, `MapOptions` (including `GlyphsRasterizationOptions`) that are required to initialize a `[MapView](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.16.1/Classes/MapView.html) `.
    
    [See more](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.16.1/Classes/MapInitOptions.html)
    
    #### Declaration
    
*   `[MapInitOptionsProvider](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.16.1/MapView.html#/c:@M@MapboxMaps@objc(pl)MapInitOptionsProvider) `
    
    A protocol used to provide `[MapInitOptions](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.16.1/Classes/MapInitOptions.html) ` when initializing a `[MapView](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.16.1/Classes/MapView.html) ` with a Storyboard or a nib.
    
    [See more](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.16.1/Protocols/MapInitOptionsProvider.html)
    
    #### Declaration
    

[### ResourceOptions](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.16.1/MapView.html#/ResourceOptions)

*   `[ResourceOptions](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.16.1/MapView.html#/s:10MapboxMaps15ResourceOptionsV) `
    
    Options to configure access to a resource
    
    [See more](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.16.1/Structs/ResourceOptions.html)
    
    #### Declaration
    
*   `[ResourceOptionsManager](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.16.1/MapView.html#/s:10MapboxMaps22ResourceOptionsManagerC) `
    
    Convenience class that manages a global `[ResourceOptions](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.16.1/Structs/ResourceOptions.html) `
    
    It’s possible to create `ResourceOptionsManager` instances as you need them, however it’s convenient to use the default object (`default`).
    
    For example, we recommend that the Mapbox access token be set in `application(_:didFinishLaunchingWithOptions:)` rather than relying on the value in your application’s Info.plist:
    
        ```
        func application(_ application: UIApplication, didFinishLaunchingWithOptions launchOptions: [UIApplication.LaunchOptionsKey: Any]?) -> Bool {
            // Override point for customization after application launch.
            ResourceOptionsManager.default.resourceOptions.accessToken = "overridden-access-token"
            return true
        }
        ```
        
    
    [See more](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.16.1/Classes/ResourceOptionsManager.html)
    
    #### Declaration
    
*   `[MapOptions](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.16.1/MapView.html#/c:objc(cs)MBMMapOptions) `
    
    [See more](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.16.1/Extensions/MapOptions.html)
    
    #### Declaration
    
*   `[GlyphsRasterizationOptions](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.16.1/MapView.html#/c:objc(cs)MBMGlyphsRasterizationOptions) `
    
    [See more](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.16.1/Extensions/GlyphsRasterizationOptions.html)
    
    #### Declaration
    
*   `[InterfaceOrientationProvider](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.16.1/MapView.html#/s:10MapboxMaps28InterfaceOrientationProviderP) `
    
    A protocol that supplies current interface orientation for the specified view.
    
    Use this protocol when the map view is used in non-application target (e.g. application extension target).
    
    [See more](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.16.1/Protocols/InterfaceOrientationProvider.html)
    
    #### Declaration
    
*   `[AttributionURLOpener](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.16.1/MapView.html#/s:10MapboxMaps20AttributionURLOpenerP) `

    Use this protocol when the map view is used in non-application target(e.g. application extension target).
    
    [See more](https://docs.mapbox.com/ios/maps/api/10.16.1/Protocols/AttributionURLOpener.html)
